login.title: Login to your account
login.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

password.label: Password
password.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

error.default: Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials.

signup.title: Create an account
signup.description: Enter your information below to create your account

firstName.label: First Name
firstName.minLength: First name must be at least 2 characters

lastName.label: Last Name
lastName.minLength: Last name must be at least 2 characters

password.label: Password
password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

error.default: Unable to create your account. Please try again.

confirmEmail.title: Email Confirmation
confirmEmail.description: We've sent a confirmation link to your email. Please check your inbox and click the link to confirm your email address.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

success.title: Check your email
success.description: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

error.default: Failed to send password reset email.

password.label: New password
password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

success.title: Password reset
success.description: Your password has been reset successfully.
